name: Spicy Pumpkin Bisque
recipeIngredient: 1 1/2 tsp Dried ground small red chilies
recipeInstructions:
1. Grate freshly grated nutmeg for garnish.
2. Saute the onion and garlic in the butter until they are soft and transparent.
3. Add the pumpkin, stock, chilies, pepper, allspice, sugar, and sherry to a pot.
4. Bring to a boil, then reduce the heat and cover.
5. Simmer for 30 minutes.
6. Puree the mixture in a blender until smooth.
7. Return the soup to the pot; add the half-and-half.
8. Simmer until heated through.
9. Garnish with nutmeg and serve.
Makes 4 servings.
Nutrient Values per Serving: 210 Calories, 12 g Fat, 7 g Saturated Fat, 9 g Protein, 17 g Carbohydrate, 31 mg Cholesterol, 846 mg Sodium.
